      • getEntityNames

        public IdSearchResults getEntityNames​(String realmName,

                                      String pattern)

        Returns entity names.
        Specified by:
        getEntityNames in interface IdentitySubjectModel
        Parameters:
        pattern - Search Pattern.
        strType - Entity Type.
        realmName - Name of Realm.
